description: Deploys a Node.js application on Amazon EKS using Helm, with S3 for object storage, CloudFront as CDN, and ALB Ingress Controller for HTTPS. Generates both Terraform (cluster, S3, VPC) and a production-ready Helm chart. Supports local testing via kind.

variables.name: project_name
variables.description: Unique name for this deployment (alphanumeric + hyphens)

variables.name: environment
variables.description: Deployment environment tag (e.g. dev, staging, prod)

variables.name: container_image
variables.description: Full ECR image URI including tag

variables.name: eks_version
variables.description: Kubernetes version for the EKS cluster

variables.name: node_instance_type
variables.description: EC2 instance type for EKS worker nodes

variables.name: node_count
variables.description: Desired number of EKS worker nodes

variables.name: s3_bucket_name
variables.description: Name for the S3 storage bucket (must be globally unique)

variables.name: certificate_arn
variables.description: ACM certificate ARN for ALB Ingress HTTPS
